sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me find all yellow objects in the grid
lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
yellow_positions = []
for r in range(4, 32):
    for c in range(33, 61):
        if lines[r][c] == 'Y':
            yellow_positions.append((r, c))

print(f"Yellow positions: {yellow_positions}")

# Group them into objects
if yellow_positions:
    # Simple grouping by row proximity
    groups = []
    current_group = [yellow_positions[0]]
    for pos in yellow_positions[1:]:
        if pos[0] - current_group[-1][0] <= 1:
            current_group.append(pos)
        else:
            groups.append(current_group)
            current_group = [pos]
    groups.append(current_group)
    
    print(f"\nYellow object groups:")
    for i, group in enumerate(groups):
        rows = [p[0] for p in group]
        cols = [p[1] for p in group]
        print(f"  Group {i}: rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, count={len(group)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
